case_title: KUO CHANG VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: FEBRUARY 22, 2016 IS SATISFIED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-22-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM. DAVID LAVINE, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,189.95 FILED BY CHANG, KUO AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, KUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, INC. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED JAN-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, INC.
